settings.title: LEGION OF LIONS    ·    A MOVEMENT OF SELF-MASTERY    ·    EST. 1994

settings.editor: Not another fitness program. A movement of self-mastery for heart-driven leaders who refuse to live like a fearful lamb. Where the mind goes, the body follows.
Two ways to live. One builds the body, the work, and the legacy you were built for. The other waits for the right time and dies waiting. Live like a lion, not a fearful lamb.

icon_list.text: Sculpts the body — and the life around it.
Leads, serves, contributes — without burning out.
Treats challenge as the path, not the obstacle.
Waits for the right time. It never arrives.
Outsources health, body, energy — to luck.
Avoids challenge — and avoids change with it.
Lets fear set the ceiling on the life lived.

settings.title:
Where the mind goes,
the body follows.

settings.editor: Three pillars hold up everything we do. Train them in order and the rest takes care of itself. Challenge creates change.
The body is the proving ground. Strength, conditioning, mobility — built deliberately, sustained for life. Not punishment. Practice.
Food is fuel for the work, not a battleground. No fads, no shortcuts. Real macros, real food, ruthless simplicity, sustained energy.
Where the mind goes the body follows. Train the inner game first — focus, courage, identity — and the outer transformation becomes inevitable.

settings.title: “Billy is truly extraordinary. With his help, I’m in the best shape of my life—doing more with less pain than I ever could in my twenties.”

settings.editor: Honoring 30+ years transforming physiques and lives through the art and science of training.
MET-Rx World's Best Personal Trainer Contest — won twice over a field of the top trainers on the planet.

settings.title:
Voted by
peers as the
elite of the year.

settings.editor: Recognized by industry leaders and fellow trainers as the personal trainer of the year.
“Billy Beck has won the World's Greatest Trainer Contest because he is truly extraordinary. With his help I'm in the best shape of my life.”
“Billy's upfront, no-BS approach to getting results was monumental in helping me conquer the mental and physical challenges that come with elite-level athletics. No fluff — just the real deal.”
“Billy exemplifies what a MASTER trainer should be. Throughout my years in the NFL, his training and nutrition strategies far surpass anything I've ever learned.”
Real transformations from real clients — battle-tested in the real world.
Every booklet purchased, every membership joined, funds meals for hungry families and protects vulnerable kids. The work is the offering. The numbers update with every transaction.

settings.title: A 3-page blueprint for the lion you were built to be.

settings.editor: The shortest path into the work — anchored by the Three Pillars: physical training, effective eating, mental conditioning. Every $7 purchase funds ~28 meals through our charity partners.
Group coaching, 1-on-1, and the BB3 app are operated as closed cohorts. New seats open when current Lions graduate. The waitlist is the only way in — first come, first considered.
